series_metadata.series_description: The Floor Plans contain the physical location on the floor for each office/pod, space number, and person assigned to that location. It also includes the location of stairwells, elevators, restrooms, storage and supply rooms, kitchen, conference rooms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until revised or superseded. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility. ; Electronic: Retain until revised or superseded. Dispose of last version when no longer occupying facility., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
